title: The impact of school absence on lifetime earnings
body: "The report investigates the link between school absence and earnings.  We find an additional day of absence for the typical student is associated with a decrease of £750 in future earnings.  We also find increased absence increases the odds, at age 28, of:   claiming benefits for a sustained period not being in stable employment   We also find a reduction in earnings at age 28 of 0.8% per day for the typical student. "
